pdfDeskewAligner.uploadDescription: Utilizes Hough transform edge fitting to probe grid axis and losslessly deskew pages to perfect horizontal alignment.
pdfDeskewAligner.successMessage: Document scanned axes horizontally aligned successfully!
pdfDeskewAligner.gyroHelp: Set detection options on the right. Gyroscope probes are aligning pages horizontally.

pdfTwoColumnReflower.uploadDescription: Intelligently split the middle gutter and vertically flow left and right columns to comfortable single-column readable layouts.
pdfTwoColumnReflower.successMessage: Academic paper double-column flow successfully reflowed to single-column!

pdfPageResizerUniform.uploadDescription: Scale and center-align varied page sizes (like A3, Letter, custom invoices) to uniform target layout sheet dimensions.
pdfPageResizerUniform.successMessage: Varied PDF sheets successfully unified to standard size!
pdfPageResizerUniform.uniformHelp: Various page shapes (A3, Letter, custom sheets) are scaled and aligned uniformly under the circular light beam.
pdfPageResizerUniform.modeFit: Adaptive Fit (Aspect ratio kept, padded margins)
pdfPageResizerUniform.modeFill: Aspect Fill (Aspect ratio kept, centered crop)

handwritingInkContrastBooster.uploadDescription: Applies local CLAHE histogram enhancement to bleach moldy shadows and sharply boost blue/black signatures and red stamp ink.
handwritingInkContrastBooster.successMessage: Handwritten stroke lines and red stamp contrast purified successfully!
handwritingInkContrastBooster.magnifierTitle: Illuminated Contrast Lens (Drag to sweep paper mold)
handwritingInkContrastBooster.bleachHelp: (Drag the right slider to bleach backing paper)

pdfSpineBookbinder.uploadDescription: Input total pages and paper density (GSM) to model and calculate binding spine mm width and compile print crease layout.
pdfSpineBookbinder.successMessage: Spine binding thickness computed and fold-line envelope generated successfully!
pdfSpineBookbinder.magnifierTitle: 3D Book Binding Crease Model (Drag mouse to rotate)

pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.uploadDescription: Click anywhere on the preview sheet to anchor interactive glowing sign-here tags and scrolling index guide bookmarks.
pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.successMessage: Interactive signature anchors and navigation pointers woven successfully!
pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.magnifierTitle: Agreement Radar Anchor Deck (Click preview to place signatures)

pdfLosslessSlicer.uploadDescription: Rewrites MediaBox viewport matrix. Physically slices local regions without rendering to blurry images, retaining clear vectors.
pdfLosslessSlicer.successMessage: High-resolution drawing local sliced out losslessly!
pdfLosslessSlicer.magnifierTitle: Laser Crop Matrix (Drag and scale visual crop borders)

pdfScratchpadCanvas.uploadDescription: Stretches paper boundary losslessly to stitch 200pt grid, ruled notebook lines, or Cornell layout drafts alongside slide margins.
pdfScratchpadCanvas.successMessage: Draft grids stitched alongside page margins successfully!
pdfScratchpadCanvas.previewTitle: 3D Folded Scratchpad Preview (Click to toggle fold animation)

toolsPage.title: Professional PDF Tools
toolsPage.subtitle: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
faqPage.noResults: No FAQs found matching your search.

whatIs.question: What is EasyPDFNex?
whatIs.answer: EasyPDFNex is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. It offers 80+ professional tools for editing, converting, merging, splitting, and securing PDF files without uploading them to any server.

isFree.question: Is EasyPDFNex really free?
isFree.answer: Yes, EasyPDFNex is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.

account.question: Do I need to create an account?
account.answer: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use EasyPDFNex. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.

uploaded.question: Are my files uploaded to a server?
uploaded.answer: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.

safe.question: Is it safe to use EasyPDFNex with sensitive documents?
safe.answer: Yes, EasyPDFNex is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.

storage.question: What happens to my files after processing?
storage.answer: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.

operations.question: What PDF operations can I perform?
operations.answer: EasyPDFNex offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.

merge.question: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
merge.answer: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.

images.question: Can I convert images to PDF?
images.answer: Yes, EasyPDFNex supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.

edit.question: Can I edit text in a PDF?
edit.answer: EasyPDFNex provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.

browsers.question: What browsers are supported?
browsers.answer: EasyPDFNex works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.

sizeLimit.question: Is there a file size limit?
sizeLimit.answer: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.

slow.question: Why is processing slow for large files?
slow.answer: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.

offline.question: Does EasyPDFNex work offline?
offline.answer: Currently, EasyPDFNex requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.

supported.question: What languages are supported?
supported.answer: EasyPDFNex is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).

change.question: How do I change the language?
change.answer: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

aboutPage.title: About {brand}
aboutPage.description: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
mission.p2: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
mission.p3: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.

fast.title: Fast & Efficient
fast.description: Powered by modern web technologies, EasyPDFNex delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.

accessible.title: Accessible Everywhere
accessible.description: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: EasyPDFNex is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.

technology.title: Built with Modern Technology
technology.description: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:

list.indexeddb: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work

technology.summary: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
